name: agentprivacy-forensic-defense
description: Incident response, breach containment, damage assessment, and evidence preservation for 0xagentprivacy swordsman operations. Activates when a privacy breach is detected or suspected, when designing post-compromise recovery procedures, when building forensic audit capabilities, or when the swordsman must shift from prevention to damage control. Triggers: "breach", "incident response", "compromise", "forensic", "damage assessment", "evidence preservation", "post-compromise", "breach containment", "data exposure", "leak detection".
